key_principles: No Default Bootstrap: Override all generic styles.
Terminal Aesthetics: Monospaced headers, typing effects, glowing accents.
Glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur for depth on dark backgrounds.
Interactive Badges: Certifications must be tactile and clickable.

technical_stack.animations: Framer Motion (optional but recommended for modals/hero) or CSS Transitions

navbar.links: Hover effect: Underline expands from center or text color shifts to Cyan.

hero.layout: Split screen or Centered with animated background.
elements: CTA Button: 'View Projects' (Outline style with glow on hover).
Background: Dark overlay on tech texture image.

project_card.style: Bootstrap Card override. Dark bg (#1E293B), border-color (#334155).
project_card.interaction: Hover: Scale up 1.02, Border turns Cyan, Glow effect.
project_card.content: Thumbnail, Title (Mono), Short Desc, Tech Stack badges.

modal.style: Dark mode modal. Header/Footer borders visible (Cyan).
modal.content: Full project details, 'View Source' button, 'Live Demo' button.

badges.style: Hexagonal or Circular shapes. CSS gradient borders.
badges.interaction: Clickable (cursor-pointer). Tooltip on hover showing verification issuer.

layout_structure.responsive_rules: Mobile-first. Stack columns on xs/sm. 2 columns on md. 3 columns on lg/xl.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INITIALIZATION: Create a new Vite React project if not already present.
3. STYLING: Import Bootstrap CSS in main.jsx but create a 'custom.css' to override defaults immediately. Do not rely on default Bootstrap colors.
4. ROUTING: Use BrowserRouter. Define routes for Home ('/') and potentially specific project details if modals aren't enough (though Modals are requested).
5. DATA: Create a 'data.js' file to store Portfolio items, Certifications, and Skills arrays for easy maintenance.
6. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all interactive elements have aria-labels, especially the icon-only buttons.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
